title: crisp comforting ukrainian graham cracker fritters
description: crunchy treats infused with a sweet ukrainian twist, perfect for snacking with a cup of coffee or tea

ingredients.name: confectioners sugar
ingredients.notes: use it for dusting after frying

instructions: in a large bowl, whisk together the graham cracker crumbs, flour, baking sugar, and sesame seeds.
in another bowl, whisk together the almond milk, melted coconut oil, egg, and vanilla extract.
slowly add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
cover the dough with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 10 minutes.
heat about 2 inches of coconut oil in a deep frying pan to 375 f

using a cookie scoop or spoon, drop small portions of the dough into the hot oil.','fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side or until golden brown.','remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.','dust the fritters with confectioners sugar and serve warm.
